title: FreeCamMC
description: A free camera for Minecraft activated with a single button!
body:
**🚀 ITITAN Hosting - Premium, Reliable & Budget-Friendly Minecraft Servers - from just €2.50/month**

Enjoy 10% off your first month with the code **JSON10**!

# FreeCamMC is a Minecraft mod that essencially puts you into spectator mode.

This can be used in both singleplayer and on servers. 

To enter freecam, press F6 and to exit, press F6 again.

Enjoy and see you next time!
